titleStmt.title: SII 37.545: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 545. (A.R. No. B 47 of 1943-44.) Rēgaḍigūḍru, Nandikotkur Taluk, Kurnool District.

summary.p: Slab set up side of the water through near the well called gāḍibhāvi, to the north of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1787, Krōdhana, Māgha ba 5, corresponding to 1866 A.D., February, 4 Sunday.
It records that the water trough which had been damaged was renovated and the lands formerly granted were restored to Maddilēṭi, the grandson of Pagiḍēla Kṛishnamma for filling the trough with water.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijeyābhyudaya śālivāhana śaka varṣaṁbulu
1787 Agunēṭi krōdhana nāma saṁ . māgha ba 5 lu lōgā vuṁnna
dharmagāḍi śithilamai vuṁnaṁduna tirigi śēyiṁci na dnu Aṁbālā ha
numaṁttu reḍiphakireḍi karuṇālu śēṣappa kumāḷlu nāgarāju
śēṣādri tiṁmmappa kumāruḍu nāgarāju śēyiṁcci yi lō
gā naḍaci yināṁ nīḷlu tōlē pagiḍēla kriṣṇamma manumaḍaina maddi
lēṭiki naḍustū vuṁnnadi yiṁduku yavaru Ālayamainā kāśi
lōna gōhatya cēśina pāpāna pōduru ....
Digital edition of SII 37.545 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
